global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a modern design, highlighting a travel offer.
global.main_message: Promoting last-minute travel savings with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A warm orange background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, in lighter shades of orange, create a modern visual interest.

elements.label: DriftPass logo
elements.description: The word 'DriftPass' is prominently displayed in bold, uppercase letters at the top, featuring a clean and modern font.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: The text 'Last-minute savings' is bold and large, centered in white, conveying urgency and importance.
elements.text_content: Last-minute savings Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: The phrase 'Hotels + flights in one tap' is smaller and placed below the headline, providing additional context in a clean font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rectangular button with rounded corners in white, featuring the text 'Get offer' in bold, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Discount percentage
elements.description: A small, bold text displaying '-30%' in white, positioned at the bottom left, indicating a discount.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A circular badge in yellow at the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold, drawing attention to the promotion.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, DriftPass, last-minute savings, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main headline, supporting text, and a call to action button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Last-minute savings, Hotels + flights in one tap, DriftPass, Get offer, -30%, SALE
